description: Classic Italian pizza with San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and fragrant basil.
Traditional Roman pasta dish made with egg, hard cheese, cured guanciale, and black pepper.
Crisp romaine lettuce tossed in creamy Caesar dressing with parmesan and toasted croutons.
Roasted marinated chicken chunks served in a rich, spiced, and creamy curry sauce.
Authentic street-style tacos filled with slow-cooked shredded beef, cilantro, and diced onions.
An assortment of premium fresh nigiri and maki rolls, served with soy sauce and freshly grated wasabi.
Stir-fried rice noodles with eggs, crushed peanuts, crisp bean sprouts, and tender chicken.
Rich beef broth packed with deeply caramelized onions, topped with rustic croutons and melted gruyere.
Tender pieces of chicken simmered in a velvety, buttery, and mildly spiced tomato sauce.
Decadent warm chocolate cake with a gooey, molten center, served with vanilla bean ice cream.
